title: Overview of Jenkins and Azure
description: Host the Jenkins build and deploy automation server in Azure and use Azure compute and storage resources to extend your continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) pipelines.
summary: Jenkinsis a popular open-source automation server used to set up continuous integration and delivery (CI/CD) for your software projects. You can host your Jenkins deployment in Azure or extend your existing Jenkins configuration using Azure resources. Jenkins plug-ins are also available to simplify CI/CD of your applications to Azure.
